scripts.build: rm -rf dist holmeta-extension.zip && mkdir -p dist/extension && rsync -a --delete --exclude 'dist' --exclude 'node_modules' --exclude '.git' --exclude 'package*.json' --exclude 'README.md' --exclude 'STORE_REVIEW.md' --exclude 'UI_ISSUES.md' --exclude 'backup' ./ dist/extension/ && (cd dist && zip -qr ../holmeta-extension.zip extension)
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
